name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the attestation, trustmark, certification, or assessment record.

description.title: Description
description.description: General description explaining the purpose, scope, or meaning of the record.

assessorLevel.title: Assessor Level
assessorLevel.description: Level or accreditation status of the assessor performing the evaluation.

assessmentLevel.title: Assessment Level
assessmentLevel.description: Level, grade, or classification assigned during the assessment process.

attestationType.title: Attestation Type
attestationType.description: Type of attestation being issued (e.g. certification, declaration, verification).

name.title: Authorisation Trustmark Name
name.description: Name of the trustmark associated with the authorisation.

imageData.title: Authorisation Trustmark Image
imageData.description: Image or logo data representing the authorisation trustmark.

mediaType.title: Authorisation Trustmark Media Type
mediaType.description: Media type of the authorisation trustmark image.

description.title: Authorisation Trustmark Description
description.description: Description of the authorisation trustmark and its significance.

code.title: Profile Score Code
code.description: Code identifying the profile score classification.

rank.title: Profile Score Rank
rank.description: Rank or rating assigned by the profile scoring system.

definition.title: Profile Score Definition
definition.description: Definition and interpretation of the profile score.

name.title: Assessed Organisation ID Scheme
name.description: Name of the identification scheme used for the assessed organisation.

name.title: Issuing Authority Name
name.description: Name of the authority responsible for issuing the authorisation.

registeredId.title: Issuing Authority Registered ID
registeredId.description: Official registration identifier of the issuing authority.

linkURL.title: Endorsement Evidence URL
linkURL.description: URL linking to evidence supporting the authorisation endorsement.

linkName.title: Endorsement Evidence Name
linkName.description: Human-readable title of the endorsement evidence resource.

linkType.title: Endorsement Evidence Type
linkType.description: Type of endorsement evidence link or resource.

mediaType.title: Endorsement Evidence Media Type
mediaType.description: Media type of the endorsement evidence resource.

name.title: Authorisation Name
name.description: Name of the authorisation, accreditation, or approval granted.

name.title: Issued To Party Name
name.description: Name of the organisation or entity to which the attestation was issued.

registeredId.title: Issued To Party Registered ID
registeredId.description: Official registration identifier of the issued party.

name.title: Reference Scheme Name
name.description: Name of the reference scheme governing the attestation.

name.title: Reference Profile Name
name.description: Name of the profile or specification against which compliance is evaluated.

linkURL.title: Auditable Evidence URL
linkURL.description: URL linking to evidence that can be audited to verify compliance.

linkName.title: Auditable Evidence Name
linkName.description: Human-readable title of the auditable evidence resource.

mediaType.title: Auditable Evidence Media Type
mediaType.description: Media type of the auditable evidence resource.

name.title: Conformity Topic Name
name.description: Name of the conformity topic addressed by the assessment criterion.

definition.title: Conformity Topic Definition
definition.description: Definition of the conformity topic associated with the assessment criterion.

name.title: Assessed Facility Name
name.description: Name of the facility that was assessed.

registeredId.title: Assessed Facility Registered ID
registeredId.description: Official registration identifier of the assessed facility.

idVerifiedByCAB.title: Facility ID Verified By CAB
idVerifiedByCAB.description: Indicates whether the facility identifier was verified by the Conformity Assessment Body.

name.title: Assessment Criteria Name
name.description: Name of the assessment criterion used during evaluation.

name.title: Performance Metric Name
name.description: Name of the performance metric evaluated during assessment.

unit.title: Performance Measure Unit
unit.description: Measurement unit used for the assessed performance metric.

value.title: Performance Measure Value
value.description: Measured value obtained for the assessed performance metric.

name.title: Assessed Organisation Name
name.description: Name of the organisation that was assessed.

registeredId.title: Assessed Organisation Registered ID
registeredId.description: Official registration identifier of the assessed organisation.

name.title: Conformity Assessment Name
name.description: Name of the conformity assessment activity or evaluation.

conformance.title: Conformance Status
conformance.description: Indicates whether the assessed entity conforms to the specified requirements.

description.title: Conformity Assessment Description
description.description: Description of the conformity assessment scope and findings.

assessmentDate.title: Assessment Date
assessmentDate.description: Date on which the conformity assessment was performed.

linkURL.title: Conformity Certificate URL
linkURL.description: URL linking to the conformity certificate document.

linkName.title: Conformity Certificate Name
linkName.description: Human-readable title of the conformity certificate.

linkType.title: Conformity Certificate Type
linkType.description: Type of certificate resource or document.

mediaType.title: Conformity Certificate Media Type
mediaType.description: Media type of the conformity certificate document.
